chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: The commissioner may procure and issue appropriate badges to patrol members for excellence in marksmanship.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 2. The California Highway Patrol [2250 - 2269]
##### § 2264

The commissioner may procure and issue appropriate badges to patrol members for excellence in marksmanship.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The commissioner may procure and issue appropriate badges to patrol members for excellence in marksmanship.
